PostToolUse.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.go) command -v goimports >/dev/null 2>&1 && goimports -w "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" ;; esac

PreToolUse.command: echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'docs/plans/architecture.md' && echo 'BLOCK: Architecture doc requires explicit approval to edit' && exit 1 || exit 0
PreToolUse.description: Protect architecture doc from accidental edits
